tasks.title: Implement governance_health_check.py
tasks.description: Python script that validates all governance YAML and MD files for schema integrity. Must cover: access_rules.md, sdd_protocols.md, versioning.md, and all agent registry entries.

tasks.title: Implement sdd_gate_enforcer.py
tasks.description: Enforces the SDD 5-spec minimum rule. Blocks a phase from transitioning to 'active' in _manifest.yaml unless its spec folder contains >= 5 valid spec files.

tasks.title: Produce access_rules_audit.md
tasks.description: Audit current access_rules.md against the live agent roster in registry.yaml. Identify any role/permission gaps or orphaned entries.

tasks.title: Write omega_gate_v3_spec.md
tasks.description: Specification document for the 12-point OMEGA Gate (extends current 4-point gate). This spec is a prerequisite for Phase 22 release gate implementation.

tasks.title: Create governance_contracts_index.yaml
tasks.description: Machine-readable index of all governance contracts, their path, schema version, last-validated date, and owning agent. Consumed by governance_health_check.py.
